positive: A stylized, whimsical jungle creature silhouette, resembling a mix of jaguar and tropical parrot, leaping through vibrant neon foliage. The composition is centralized and balanced, featuring strong, clean outlines against a dramatic, gradient background of deep indigo and electric turquoise. The style should be geometric modern vector art, highly saturated, with visible depth achieved through negative space. The creature should have powerful, dynamic poses, surrounded by oversized, detailed leaves and exotic floral patterns. Clean lines, high contrast, suitable for apparel printing, minimalist yet busy in pattern.
